examples: We start down the hill toward the entranceway.
They were trying to blast to open an entranceway.
The entranceway is the first impression that you get about a home or office.
Gaston said his only contact with police on that day was when officers told him not to touch Madison's body, which was lying behind Gaston's truck, parked in the motel entranceway.
The chain, which had scotched its signature blue A-frame design in favor of big boxes that can seat more customers, is testing a new prototype that uses the A-frame as a restaurant's entranceway.
